name: Cheezies Gourmet
tagline: Branding and web presence for a Maine artisan food business
description: A custom website and brand identity built for a local Maine artisan food company. Showcases products, tells the brand story, and handles customer inquiries. Built to feel handcrafted and authentic — the way the food itself is made.
forWho: Small food businesses and artisan makers who need a real web presence that matches the quality of what they make — not a generic template.
story: Maine has a deep culture of small-batch, handcrafted food. Cheezies Gourmet deserved a site that felt like that — warm, real, and personal. This project is also a preview of what I'll build for Half Baked Café & Bakehouse when the time comes.
details: Static site with custom CSS and hand-written copy. Optimized for mobile. No CMS dependency — simple, fast, and easy for the owner to update.
